sentences.arabic: افْتَتَحَ الْمُسْتَشْفَى الْعَامُّ جَنَاحًا جَدِيدًا مَخْصَّصًا لِعِلَاجِ الْأَطْفَالِ.
sentences.translation: Opća bolnica otvorila je novu pedijatriju namijenjenu liječenju djece.
sentences.translationEn: The public hospital opened a new wing dedicated to treating children.

sentences.arabic: يَضُمُّ الْجَنَاحُ خَمْسِينَ سَرِيرًا وَغُرَفًا مُجَهَّزَةً بِأَحْدَثِ الْأَجْهِزَةِ الطِّبِّيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Odjel ima pedeset kreveta i sobe opremljene najmodernijom medicinskom opremom.
sentences.translationEn: The ward has fifty beds and rooms equipped with the latest medical devices.

sentences.arabic: رَسَمَ الْفَنَّانُونَ جُدُرَانَ الْجَنَاحِ بِصُوَرٍ مُبَهِجَةٍ لِتُرِيحَ الْأَطْفَالَ الْمَرْضَى.
sentences.translation: Umjetnici su oslikali zidove odjela veselim slikama kako bi umirili bolesnu djecu.
sentences.translationEn: Artists painted the ward walls with cheerful images to comfort sick children.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ مُدِيرُ الْمُسْتَشْفَى إِنَّ الْجَنَاحَ الْجَدِيدَ سَيُقَدِّمُ خِدْمَاتٍ أَفْضَلَ لِلْأُسَرِ.
sentences.translation: Direktor bolnice rekao je da će novi odjel pružati bolje usluge porodicama.
sentences.translationEn: The hospital director said the new wing will provide better services to families.

sentences.arabic: شَكَرَ الْأَهَالِي الْمَسْؤُولِينَ عَلَى هَذِهِ الْخُطْوَةِ الَّتِي طَالَ انْتِظَارُهَا.
sentences.translation: Roditelji su zahvalili zvaničnicima na ovom dugo očekivanom koraku.
sentences.translationEn: Parents thanked officials for this long-awaited step.
